_comment: Feature pages that still have no tutorial. This file is a RATCHET: tests/test_tutorial_scenarios.py fails if a feature page appears that is not listed here, so a NEW or CHANGED feature must grow a tutorial. Shrink this list -- never extend it without a reason. As of 2026-07-11 the backlog is EMPTY: every feature page now ships a hand-authored tutorial (authored in scripts/build_tutorial_scenarios.py). A newly added feature page will fail the coverage ratchet until it grows a scenario here or in the generator.
